title: 3x Floral Carpet Freshener With Deodorising Baking Soda - 595g (Jasmine)
features: Add a refreshing scent to your carpet with this Floral Carpet Freshener. Made with baking soda, it also has deodorising properties to keep your carpet smelling fresh and clean.
With a volume of 595g, this powder form carpet freshener is perfect for a single application. This product is suitable for carpets and comes in a mix scent.
It is manufactured in China and is a great addition to your cleaning products. Make your carpet look and smell great with this Floral Carpet Freshener.
